sources.name: xianyu_search_python_automation_real

page_actions.script: () => { const clickIfVisible = (selector) => { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); return true; } return false; }; const selectors = ['.ant-modal-close', '[class*="closeIcon"]', '[class*="close-icon"]', '[aria-label="Close"]']; for (const selector of selectors) { clickIfVisible(selector); } const blockers = ['.ant-modal-root', '[class*="login-iframe-wrap"]', '#xy-login-iframe']; for (const selector of blockers) { for (const node of document.querySelectorAll(selector)) { if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.style.display = 'none'; node.remove(); } } } for (const node of document.querySelectorAll('.ant-modal-mask')) { if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.style.display = 'none'; node.remove(); } } if (document.body instanceof HTMLElement) { document.body.style.overflow = 'auto'; } return document.querySelectorAll('[class*="feeds-item-wrap"]').length; }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const cardSelector = '[class*="feeds-item-wrap"]'; const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="goofish.com/item?id="], a[href*="/item?id="], a[href*="item?id="]')); const candidates = anchors.length ? anchors : Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(cardSelector)); const seen = new Set(); return candidates.map((node) => { const anchor = node instanceof HTMLAnchorElement ? node : node.querySelector('a[href]'); const card = (node instanceof HTMLElement ? node.closest(cardSelector) || node : null) || (anchor ? anchor.closest(cardSelector) : null) || anchor; if (!card) return null; const url = anchor ? toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || '') : ''; const title = normalize((card.querySelector('[class*="main-title"]') || anchor || card).textContent); const priceText = normalize((card.querySelector('[class*="price-wrap"]') || {}).textContent || ''); const sellerParts = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="seller-text"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const tagParts = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="cpv"], [class*="service"], [class*="price-desc"], [class*="recommend-reason"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const summary = normalize(card.innerText); return { title, url, priceText, sellerName: sellerParts.join(' / '), cityName: sellerParts[0] || '', tags: tagParts.join(' / '), summary }; }).filter((item) => item && item.title && item.url && /\/item\?id=/.test(item.url) && !seen.has(item.url) && seen.add(item.url)); }

sources.name: bilibili_hot_videos_real

page_actions.script: () => { const closeButton = document.querySelector('.login-tip .close'); if (closeButton instanceof HTMLElement) { closeButton.click(); } return document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/video/BV"]').length; }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.video-list-item .bili-video-card, .bili-video-card')); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const card of cards) { const infoAnchor = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__info--right a[href*="/video/BV"]'); const fallbackAnchor = card.querySelector('a[href*="/video/BV"]'); const anchor = infoAnchor || fallbackAnchor; const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor?.getAttribute('href') || anchor?.href || ''); if (!url || !/\/video\/BV/i.test(url) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const titleNode = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__info--tit'); const imageNode = card.querySelector('picture img[alt]'); const title = normalize(titleNode?.getAttribute('title') || titleNode?.textContent || imageNode?.getAttribute('alt') || anchor?.getAttribute('title') || ''); if (!title) { continue; } const metaNodes = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.bili-video-card__info--bottom, .bili-video-card__stats')); const metaText = normalize(metaNodes.map((node) => normalize(node.textContent)).filter(Boolean).join(' | ')); items.push({ title, content: metaText.slice(0, 240), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); } return { items }; }

page_actions.script: () => { const closeButton = document.querySelector('.login-tip .close'); if (closeButton instanceof HTMLElement) { closeButton.click(); } return document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/video/BV"]').length; }

seed_source.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.video-list-item .bili-video-card, .bili-video-card')); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const card of cards) { const infoAnchor = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__info--right a[href*="/video/BV"]'); const fallbackAnchor = card.querySelector('a[href*="/video/BV"]'); const anchor = infoAnchor || fallbackAnchor; const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor?.getAttribute('href') || anchor?.href || ''); if (!url || !/\/video\/BV/i.test(url) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const titleNode = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__info--tit'); const imageNode = card.querySelector('picture img[alt]'); const title = normalize(titleNode?.getAttribute('title') || titleNode?.textContent || imageNode?.getAttribute('alt') || anchor?.getAttribute('title') || ''); if (!title) { continue; } const metaNodes = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.bili-video-card__info--bottom, .bili-video-card__stats')); const metaText = normalize(metaNodes.map((node) => normalize(node.textContent)).filter(Boolean).join(' | ')); items.push({ title, content: metaText.slice(0, 240), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); } return { items }; }

page_actions.script: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const closeTexts = ['稍后再说', '以后再说', '知道了', '我知道了', '关闭']; for (const text of closeTexts) { const node = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div, span')).find((item) => normalize(item.textContent) === text); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } return document.body ? document.body.innerText.slice(0, 200) : ''; }

sources.name: xiaohongshu_hot_notes_real

page_actions.script: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const texts = ['同意', '知道了', '稍后再说', '下次再说']; for (const text of texts) { const node = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div, span')).find((item) => normalize(item.textContent) === text); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } const closeSelectors = ['[class*="close"]', '[aria-label="关闭"]', '.close']; for (const selector of closeSelectors) { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } return document.body ? document.body.innerText.slice(0, 200) : ''; }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const selectors = ['a[href*="/explore/"]', 'a[href*="/discovery/item/"]', 'section.note-item', '[class*="note-item"]']; const rawNodes = selectors.flatMap((selector) => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector))); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const node of rawNodes) { const anchor = node instanceof HTMLAnchorElement ? node : node.querySelector('a[href*="/explore/"], a[href*="/discovery/item/"]'); if (!(anchor instanceof HTMLAnchorElement)) { continue; } const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || ''); if (!url || (!url.includes('/explore/') && !url.includes('/discovery/item/')) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const card = (anchor.closest('section') || anchor.closest('div') || anchor); const titleCandidates = [card.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), card.querySelector('img[alt]'), anchor.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), anchor]; const title = normalize(titleCandidates.map((item) => item instanceof HTMLElement ? (item.getAttribute('alt') || item.getAttribute('title') || item.textContent || '') : '').find(Boolean) || ''); const contentCandidates = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="desc"], [class*="content"], [class*="text"], [class*="name"], [class*="info"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const content = normalize(contentCandidates.join(' | ') || card.textContent || ''); if (!title) { continue; } items.push({ title, content: content.slice(0, 280), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); } return { items }; }

page_actions.script: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const texts = ['同意', '知道了', '稍后再说', '下次再说']; for (const text of texts) { const node = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, div, span')).find((item) => normalize(item.textContent) === text); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } const closeSelectors = ['[class*="close"]', '[aria-label="关闭"]', '.close']; for (const selector of closeSelectors) { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } return document.body ? document.body.innerText.slice(0, 200) : ''; }

seed_source.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const selectors = ['a[href*="/explore/"]', 'a[href*="/discovery/item/"]', 'section.note-item', '[class*="note-item"]']; const rawNodes = selectors.flatMap((selector) => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector))); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const node of rawNodes) { const anchor = node instanceof HTMLAnchorElement ? node : node.querySelector('a[href*="/explore/"], a[href*="/discovery/item/"]'); if (!(anchor instanceof HTMLAnchorElement)) { continue; } const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || ''); if (!url || (!url.includes('/explore/') && !url.includes('/discovery/item/')) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const card = (anchor.closest('section') || anchor.closest('div') || anchor); const titleCandidates = [card.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), card.querySelector('img[alt]'), anchor.querySelector('[class*="title"]'), anchor]; const title = normalize(titleCandidates.map((item) => item instanceof HTMLElement ? (item.getAttribute('alt') || item.getAttribute('title') || item.textContent || '') : '').find(Boolean) || ''); const contentCandidates = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('[class*="desc"], [class*="content"], [class*="text"], [class*="name"], [class*="info"]')).map((item) => normalize(item.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const content = normalize(contentCandidates.join(' | ') || card.textContent || ''); if (!title) { continue; } items.push({ title, content: content.slice(0, 280), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); if (items.length >= 5) { break; } } return { items }; }

sources.name: taobao_service_market_real

page_actions.script: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const closeSelectors = ['.ant-modal-close', '[class*="closeIcon"]', '[class*="close-icon"]', '[aria-label="Close"]']; for (const selector of closeSelectors) { const node = document.querySelector(selector); if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.click(); } } for (const selector of ['.ant-modal-mask', '.ant-modal-root']) { for (const node of document.querySelectorAll(selector)) { if (node instanceof HTMLElement) { node.style.display = 'none'; node.remove(); } } } if (document.body instanceof HTMLElement) { document.body.style.overflow = 'auto'; } return normalize(document.body ? document.body.innerText.slice(0, 200) : ''); }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const allowedPatterns = ['fuwu.taobao.com/ser/list.htm', 'fw.taobao.com/common/detail.html', 'fuwu.taobao.com/module/service-market-order-confirm/extendApp']; const blockedTexts = ['登录', '首页', '返回旧版', '我的服务', '服务商入驻']; const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const anchor of Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href]'))) { const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor.getAttribute('href') || anchor.href || ''); if (!url || !allowedPatterns.some((pattern) => url.includes(pattern)) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const title = normalize(anchor.getAttribute('title') || anchor.textContent || ''); const card = anchor.closest('div, section, li, article') || anchor; const content = normalize((card instanceof HTMLElement ? card.innerText : anchor.textContent) || '').slice(0, 240); if (!title || title.length < 4 || title.length > 80) { continue; } if (blockedTexts.some((text) => title === text || content.includes(text))) { continue; } items.push({ title, content, url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); if (items.length >= 30) { break; } } return { items }; }
